question: Which project tasks have a status of 'pending' and an amount greater than 10,000 USD, showing the reference number, event date, and amount?
sql: SELECT t.reference_number, t.event_date, t.amount, t.currency, t.notes FROM `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`proj_tasks` t WHERE t.status = 'pending' AND t.amount > 10000 AND t.currency = 'USD' ORDER BY t.amount DESC

question: For each approved project closing, show the project name, project code, closing reference number, closing amount, and currency?
sql: SELECT p.name AS project_name, p.code AS project_code, pc.reference_number, pc.amount, pc.currency, pc.event_date FROM `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`proj_project_closings` pc JOIN `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`proj_projects` p ON pc.projects_id = p.id WHERE pc.status = 'approved' ORDER BY pc.amount DESC

question: What is the total and average task amount per project, along with the count of tasks, for projects that have more than one task, ordered by total amount descending?
sql: SELECT p.name AS project_name, p.code AS project_code, COUNT(t.id) AS task_count, SUM(t.amount) AS total_amount, AVG(t.amount) AS avg_amount, t.currency FROM `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`proj_tasks` t JOIN `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`proj_projects` p ON t.projects_id = p.id GROUP BY p.name, p.code, t.currency HAVING COUNT(t.id) > 1 ORDER BY total_amount DESC
